content: Phase 2: Build FastAPI backend - models, db, indicators, regime, costs, warehouse, backtest, walkforward, server
Phase 2: Implement 6 built-in strategies as plugins
Phase 2: Build React frontend - Dashboard, Backtest Lab, Strategy Library, Data Warehouse, Pre-trade Checklist, Signal Journal, Paper Trading, Optimizer & Live placeholders
Phase 2: Fix Lightweight Charts locale + add candle fetch
Phase 2: Manual smoke-test - Dashboard, BacktestLab full run, Checklist, Warehouse, Strategy Library
Phase 2: All user stories covered in V1 build
Phase 3: Implement Auto-Optimizer (Optuna + Grid + CMA-ES) with walk-forward + heatmaps + robustness
Phase 4: Upstox OAuth + WS tick stream + Live Signal Console + paper trading + audit trail
Phase 5: Probabilistic exit engine (Kaplan-Meier) + meta-model + position sizing + event filter + VIX overlay + What-If + Telegram
Phase 6: Swing Extension - daily/weekly TF + overnight risk
Phase 7: Local Deployment Package - Docker Compose + scripts + LOCAL_SETUP_GUIDE.md
